case_title: JOHN ABRAM ET AL VS. LAUS INVESTMENT GROUP

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,250.00 FILED BY ABRAM, JOHN EDDIE, ANDREW CAINDEC, JARED KAI ROGERS, COLE AS TO DEFENDANT LAUS INVESTMENT GROUP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-16-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
